name: What's first step after noticing work hearing loss?

mainEntity.name: What's first step after noticing work hearing loss?

acceptedAnswer.description: Get audiogram and notify employer in writing.[6][7] Context: Starts medical proof and claim process.[6] Key factors: Early testing shows baseline damage.[1] Practical guidance: See doctor, file incident report, consult lawyer before insurer; preserve evidence.[7] Act within days.
